name: mailman-sandbox
description: Import Google Chat spec messages into Mailman from a Codex sandbox session.

interface.shortDescription: Import Google Chat specs into Mailman from Codex sandbox.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through extracting Google Chat messages in a sandbox session, saving a JSON snapshot, and importing it into the shared Mailman runtime.
defaultPrompt: Import recent Google Chat spec messages into Mailman.
Collect a Chat snapshot in sandbox and show the latest threads.
Use Mailman Sandbox to pull API specs from Google Chat.
